title: Friend Finder
description: A simple mod that helps you find your friends in the Minecraft world
body:
Friend Finder is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod that helps you locate your friends in the Minecraft world. The mod displays a simple directional indicator with distance information, making it easy to find and meet up with other players on your server.

Press the I key to display on your HUD! No more asking "Where are you?" in chat!

**Currently only tested with 2 players**

## Features

- Directional Tracking: Shows the angle you need to turn to face your friend
- Distance Display: Displays horizontal distance to your friend in blocks
- Height Indicator: Shows the vertical difference when your friend is above or below you
- Toggle Function: Press F key to turn the display on/off instantly
- Automatic Friend Detection: Always tracks the nearest player to you
- Minimal UI: Clean, unobtrusive text display that won't clutter your screen

## How It Works

Friend Finder displays a simple message above your hotbar with:
- Your friend's username
- The angle to turn to face them (in degrees)
- The horizontal distance to them (in blocks)
- The height difference when applicable (with + or - sign)

## Usage

- To get back to your friend you basically just need to reduce all the numbers down to 0!
- Press I key to toggle Friend Finder display on / off
- Binding can be changed in Minecraft's Controls menu under "Friend Finder"

## Why Use Friend Finder?

- No more asking "Where are you?" in chat
- No more checking co-ords in F3
- Stop wandering around aimlessly looking for each other!
- Find your way back to your group after exploring
- Coordinate builds and adventures more efficiently
- Works in all dimensions (Overworld, Nether, End)

## Compatibility

- Works with Minecraft 1.21.5
- Requires Fabric Loader and Fabric API
- Client-side only (works on any server)
- No conflicts with other mods known

## Resource Usage

Friend Finder is designed to be extremely lightweight with minimal impact on performance. It uses simple calculations and text rendering to avoid any FPS drops or lag.
